title: dracophyllum × montanum
intro: Dracophyllum × montanum, also known as the mountain drift, is a hybrid species of shrub that belongs to the family Epacridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dracophyllum × montanum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. Dracophyllum × montanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional Australian medicine.
